data.title: Netanyahu Says War With Iran Isn’t Over, Need to Secure Uranium
data.description: The US-Israeli war with Iran is “not over” because there’s nuclear material in the country that still needs to be removed, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said.
data.keywords: Iran,War,Donald John Trump,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Israel,Markets,Energy,Greener Living,Politics,Middle East,politics,world
